title: alyssum neglectum
intro: Alyssum neglectum, also known as loose-flowered alyssum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of alyssum neglectum include its potential to support kidney function, relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections, and provide antioxidant properties. Alyssum neglectum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
